title: Forge registry snapshot (forge/.forge/registry.json)
description: The generated artifact catalog written by `forge registry build` and validated by `lint/validate-registry.mjs`. Keyed by uid = "<kind>:<id>". Field semantics owned by Bundle A (BR-REG/BR-VER); Bundle F ships this layout stub at v0.2. See docs/manager/spec/SPEC-01-registry.md §Data structures.

schemaVersion.description: On-disk schema version for the store's compatibility gate.

VERSION.description: Mirror of forge/VERSION; authority and drift check owned by SPEC-02.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the snapshot was generated.

artifacts.description: Every discovered harness artifact, sorted by uid (BR-REG-006).

danglingRefs.description: Unresolved dependsOn targets; populated by SPEC-03 (v0.3), allowed empty.

contentHash.description: Lowercase 64-hex sha256 of the artifact bytes (ADR-0005).

criticality.description: Stored here; semantics owned by Bundle D (ADR-0013).

dependsOn.description: Dependency uids; populated by SPEC-03 (v0.3), allowed empty.

eval.description: Eval-linkage slot; payload owned by Bundle E. Allowed empty at v0.2.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 creation timestamp; preserved across unchanged builds (BR-REG-006).

source.description: OPTIONAL federated-catalog provenance (ADR-0017). Present only on artifacts ADMITTED from an external source; local/owned artifacts omit it (not in `required`). Records the source id + the exact upstream commit the bytes were synced from, so drift vs upstream is answerable alongside contentHash (ADR-0005).

sourceId.description: The source id this artifact was admitted from (-> manifests/sources.json#sources[].id).

repoUrl.description: Clone URL (git) or filesystem path (local) of the originating source.

ref.description: Branch/tag/commit the source tracks (mirror of the source's `ref`).

commit.description: Exact upstream commit the admitted bytes were synced from (from .forge/sources.lock).

importedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the artifact was admitted into the library.
